Hero.headline: Let us carry the burden. You focus on healing.
Hero.subheadline: We understand how overwhelming medical travel can feel. From your first consultation to your safe return home, our personal coordinators in Calicut walk beside you every single step of the way.

Services.heading: Every Detail Handled With Care
Services.subheading: From airport transfers to hospital check-ins, we take care of all the logistics so you can focus entirely on getting well.

pickup.title: Airport & Home Pickup
pickup.desc: We receive you from the airport, railway station, or coordinate door-to-door from your home country.

hospital.title: Hospital & Treatment Coordination
hospital.desc: Allopathy and Ayurveda — we shortlist the best facility for your condition and budget.

estimate.title: Expert Medical Estimate
estimate.desc: Share your medical records. Our experts analyse and send you a detailed cost estimate within 48 hours.

video.title: Online Doctor Consultation
video.desc: Speak with the specialist before you travel. Book a video consultation for a small fee.

hotel.title: Accommodation & Food
hotel.desc: Comfortable stays near the hospital — from budget guesthouses to premium hotels, with meal options.

visa.title: Visa & Travel Assistance
visa.desc: We guide you through India's medical visa process and handle all paperwork. Optional, on request.

leaf.title: Kerala Tour Add-On
leaf.desc: Recover in paradise. We can plan a short cultural tour of Kerala for you and your companion.

companion.title: Companion Program
companion.desc: Your travel companion gets sightseeing options, companion stays, and full support while you recover.

emergency.title: 24/7 Coordinator
emergency.desc: A dedicated coordinator is available round the clock throughout your stay in Kerala.

CostComparison.heading: How Much Could You Save in Kerala?
CostComparison.subheading: Compare typical treatment costs across countries. Note: These figures are indicative estimates for conceptual comparison only; actual prices depend on hospital choice, patient condition, and specific treatment plans.
CostComparison.note: All prices in {currency} equivalent. Note: These are conceptual estimates for general comparison and do not represent actual final billing. You pay partner hospitals directly. TreatInKerala guarantees special institutional corporate rates (15-20% lower than standard walk-in international tariffs) + free logistics support.

step1.title: Share Your Details
step1.desc: Fill our simple form — your condition, records, and preferences. No technical jargon needed.

step2.title: Expert Review
step2.desc: Our medical team reviews your records and matches you to the right hospital or Ayurveda centre.

step3.title: Receive Estimate
step3.desc: Get a detailed cost estimate within 48 hours — covering treatment, lodging, travel, and support.

step4.title: Video Call
step4.desc: Consult your treating specialist in Kerala over a secure video call before you finalize details.

step5.title: Confirm & We Start
step5.desc: Once you're ready, we handle visa, travel booking, accommodation, and airport arrangements.

step6.title: Arrive in Kerala
step6.desc: We receive you personally. Your coordinator stays with you throughout your entire stay.

step7.title: Treatment & Recovery
step7.desc: Receive world-class care. We coordinate every appointment, report, and query on your behalf.

step8.title: Safe Return Home
step8.desc: We arrange your return travel, send all medical reports, and remain available for follow-up.

FAQ.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subheading: Find answers to common questions about medical treatments, travel, and logistics in Kerala.
FAQ.q1: How much does heart surgery cost in Kerala?
FAQ.a1: A Cardiac Bypass Surgery in Kerala typically costs around $6,000 USD, including TreatInKerala coordination fees. This represents savings of 80% to 95% compared to countries like the UK ($40,000) or USA ($120,000).
FAQ.q2: Is Kerala safe for medical tourism?
FAQ.a2: Yes, Kerala is highly safe and has been recognized as one of India's safest states. It features high literacy rates, widely spoken English, clean environments, and premium private healthcare systems accustomed to international patients.
FAQ.q3: How do I get a medical visa for India?
FAQ.a3: India offers an electronic Medical Visa (e-Medical Visa) which can be applied for online. You will need a formal invitation letter from the treating hospital in Kerala, which TreatInKerala will arrange for you once you decide to proceed.
FAQ.q4: Which hospitals in Kerala are accredited?
FAQ.a4: We partner with hospitals that hold National Accreditation Board for Hospitals & Healthcare Providers (NABH) accreditation and Joint Commission International (JCI) certifications, ensuring world-class clinical standards.
FAQ.a5: Panchakarma is a comprehensive Ayurvedic detoxification and rejuvenation therapy consisting of five therapeutic procedures (Vamana, Virechana, Basti, Nasya, Raktamokshana) customized by a qualified Ayurvedic doctor.
FAQ.q6: How is TreatInKerala 100% free? Are there markups on treatment prices?
FAQ.a6: We do not charge patients any coordination fees. TreatInKerala is fully funded by corporate marketing budgets from our partner hospitals under direct institutional agreements. You pay the hospital directly for your treatment and room charges with zero markups or hidden fees.
FAQ.q7: Can I book directly with the hospital? Why should I book through TreatInKerala?
FAQ.a7: Yes, you can contact hospitals directly, but booking through TreatInKerala guarantees you special institutional corporate rates (typically 15-20% lower than standard walk-in international patient tariffs). Additionally, you receive our complete travel concierge bundle—including free visa assistance, Calicut airport reception, an Arabic medical translator, and a local SIM card—fully coordinated at zero charge.

Packages.heading: Transparent Concierge Packages
Packages.subheading: We handle the stress of planning, translation, accommodation, and transport so you can focus entirely on healing. Select the service level that fits your travel needs.
Packages.essentialDesc: Perfect for independent travelers who want baseline medical logistics and pickup services.
Packages.premiumDesc: Full-service luxury care coordination. Ideal for GCC patients traveling with family companions.
Packages.hybridNoteDesc: Treatment prices in India are highly variable and depend on your actual clinical diagnosis. We do not publish flat-rate treatment costs to prevent misleading quotes. Instead, we provide custom quotes from 2-3 top hospitals within 24 hours.
Packages.step1Desc: Send your recent scans or medical records via our secure portal or WhatsApp.
Packages.step2Desc: Receive verified medical opinions and exact cost estimates from 2-3 top hospitals.
Packages.step3Desc: Choose your hospital and concierge package. We handle the visa, lodging, and pickup.
Packages.tourSubheading: Vetted medical-safe getaways designed for relaxation, wheelchair accessibility, and zero physical strain. Perfect for post-surgery healing or companion sightseeing.

houseboat.title: The Backwater Retreat
houseboat.desc: The ultimate post-surgery recovery. Float through serene backwaters in a luxury AC houseboat with zero physical exertion. Organic customized meals included.

munnar.title: High-Altitude Wellness
munnar.desc: Breathe pure mountain air in Kerala's premium hill station. Perfect for Ayurvedic detoxes, stress relief, and pre-treatment relaxation.

kochi.title: Coastal Heritage
kochi.desc: A light, wheelchair-accessible cultural tour for family companions. Includes historic Fort Kochi and a relaxing evening by the Arabian Sea.
